title: IssuanceProtocol
description: Protocols used to deliver credentials from issuer to holder

OID4VCI_PRE_AUTH.description: OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance — Pre-Authorized Code Flow
OID4VCI_PRE_AUTH.flow: Issuer generates a pre-authorized code. Holder wallet exchanges code for credential without prior user authentication at issuer.
OID4VCI_PRE_AUTH.use_case: Default for most mobile and web credential delivery; airline credentials, government IDs

OID4VCI_AUTH_CODE.description: OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance — Authorization Code Flow
OID4VCI_AUTH_CODE.flow: Holder authenticates with issuer via OAuth authorization code flow before receiving credential.
OID4VCI_AUTH_CODE.use_case: High-assurance issuance where holder identity must be re-confirmed at wallet

DIRECT.flow: Issuer pushes credential directly to holder via API; no OID4VCI offer URI.
